content.text:
Zero type errors. The project compiles cleanly. Here's what was created:

---

**32 React components** reverse-engineered from the SolidJS bundle, organized into a clean TypeScript library:

### Bars (6)
- `HealthBar` — Unit health bar with fill, highlight, segments overlay
- `ManaBar` — Blue mana bar 
- `XPBar` — Hero XP progress bar
- `ProgressBar` — Generic timed progress indicator
- `BuildProgressBar` — Construction progress bar
- `LoadingBar` — Full-width loading screen bar with track, fill, glass, glow layers

### Buttons (6)
- `GlueButton` — Login/menu screen button with stone tiling + gold border
- `SmallButton` — Compact secondary action button
- `CampaignButton` — Campaign menu button with unique backdrop
- `EscOptionButton` — Race-themed ESC menu button (faction-aware)
- `MenuButton` — Primary action button with decorative frame border
- `CommandButton` — In-game ability button with pressed/disabled/cooldown/passive states

### Controls (7)
- `Checkbox` — Race-specific toggle (depressed texture varies by faction)
- `RadioButton` — Mutually exclusive option selector
- `Slider` — ESC menu slider with race-specific thumb
- `Scrollbar` — Vertical scroll track with arrows + draggable knob
- `Dropdown` — Pull-down popup selector
- `Editbox` — Text input in ESC and Battle.net styles
- `Textarea` — Multi-line scrollable text area

### Game UI (6)
- `CommandCard` — 4x3 ability grid
- `ResourceCounter` — Animated gold/lumber/supply counter
- `PortraitFrame` — Masked hero portrait with decorative overlay
- `UnitQueue` — Build queue panel
- `Tooltip` — Rich tooltip with title, hotkey, costs
- `Minimap` — Minimap frame with fog + animated pings

### Data Display (4)
- `HeroCard` / `HeroCardCompact` / `HeroCardSkeleton` — Hero info cards
- `ChatLog` — Color-coded in-game chat messages

### Layout (5)
- `FactionSelector` — Race tab selector
- `BorderFrame` — 9-slice race-themed panel border
- `SectionCard` — Dark showcase container
- `ShowcaseItem` — Individual demo display
- `TokenSwatch` / `BundleChart` — Design token + size visualization

### Utilities
- `loadBlpDataUrl` / `loadBlpImage` — BLP1 texture decoder (JPEG + palette)
- `useBlpTexture` / `useBlpTextures` — React hooks for async BLP loading
- Complete asset path constants for all ~130 BLP textures
- Race-aware asset resolvers (`getEscButtonAssets`, `getSliderKnob`, etc.)

### Usage
```tsx
import { HealthBar, CommandCard, GlueButton } from "wc3-components";
import "wc3-components/src/wc3.css";
```

The BLP assets need to be served from your public directory at the same paths (e.g. `/bars/human-healthbar-fill.blp`).
